/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.7 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/quan.dir/quan_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quan.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quan.dir/mainwindow1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quan.dir/karnaughwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quan.dir/qlsolver.cpp.o -o quan.app/Contents/MacOS/quan -F/Users/quangkhanh/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/quangkhanh/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib /Users/quangkhanh/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /Users/quangkhanh/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /Users/quangkhanh/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
